description.plain: 【High Tech Frame】Steel soft tail frame has better strength, stability and toughness, which can better absorb vibration. Compared with aluminum frame, rider is not easy to feel fatigued during riding,enjoys the adventure on mountain roads, forest paths and highways. 【Full Suspension】Full suspension bike has better shock absorption,adapt to more terrains,giving you a more comfortable ride on rough roads and provide a durable riding experience.In addition,Soft tail ensures that the tires are fully gripped to maintain control on descents. 【Professional Drive Train】SHIMANO twist grip shifter is precise and simple to control, a wide range of gears gives you more control for climbing and room to get low on descents, corners and jumps.Internal shift and brake cable make cables last longer by protecting them. 【4 INCH FAT TIRE】Width up to 4 inches, 5 times more wear resistance than ordinary bicycle tires. Strong grip and anti-skid, fully able to challenge any terrain, conquer any off-road trails and urban roads. 【85% assembled】Arrives 85% assembled, all you need to do is install the front wheel, handlebars, saddle and pedals and you're ready to enjoy the ride. We will also provide instructions and an installation video. 【Free Return 】The item can be returned for free, but it must be undamaged, with the packaging intact, and show no signs of use. Additionally, the item must be in a resellable condition. Please also keep the packaging for at least one month after receiving the bicycle. products.title: Specialized S-Works Fatboy Fat Bike - 2018, Large

media.alt_text: Specialized S-Works Fatboy Fat Bike - 2018, Large

variants.title: Specialized S-Works Fatboy Fat Bike - 2018, Large

description.plain: The Specialized S-Works Fatboy is a high-performance fat bike built for riders who want lightweight efficiency and confident traction across snow, sand, and loose terrain, pairing a carbon frame with oversized tire clearance for maximum flotation and stability. Despite its fat-bike capability, the frame maintains a responsive, lively ride feel that helps it accelerate efficiently and handle more precisely than many traditional fat bikes. Its geometry balances stability on soft surfaces with enough agility for tighter trails and varied winter riding conditions, resulting in a capable, lightweight platform designed for year-round adventure and technical loose-terrain riding.

products.title: PHATMOTO® ALL TERRAIN Fat Tire | Available in 3 Colors  | Free Shipping |

description.plain: A high-performance fat tire motorized bicycle with integrated gas tank and jackshaft drive, designed for off-road adventures.

unique_selling_points: Combines a built-in gas tank and jackshaft drive train in a single frame for seamless pedal or engine-powered riding.
metadata.top_features:
Integrated 79cc 4-stroke engine with built-in gas tank enables both pedal and engine-powered riding for versatile use
Jackshaft drive train and 10-gauge spoke wheels provide durability and stability on rough terrain
Front and rear hydraulic disc brakes ensure reliable stopping power in challenging conditions
Upgraded 26-inch suspension fork and thicker frame tubes enhance ride comfort and control
Removable front and rear racks offer customizable cargo options for off-road trips
metadata.tech_specs:
Engine: 79cc 4-stroke, 3.0 HP Lifan OHV
Fuel Tank Capacity: 0.75 gallon (2.85 L)
Max Speed: 32 mph (with 44T rear sprocket)
Range: Up to 100 miles per full tank
Gears: Shimano 7-speed
Frame Material: Aluminum
Wheel Size: 26 inches
Brakes: Front and rear hydraulic disc brakes
Suspension: 26-inch front fork
Dry Weight: 32 kg
Warranty: 90-day limited

media.alt_text: 2024 PHATMOTO® ALL TERRAIN Fat Tire | Available in 3 Colors  | Free Shipping | - Phatmoto

variants.title: PHATMOTO® ALL TERRAIN Fat Tire | Available in 3 Colors  | Free Shipping |

description.plain: PHATMOTO™ ALL TERRAIN Fat Tire - 79cc 4 Stroke is the only Motorized Bicycle that integrates both a built-in gas tank and jackshaft drive train as part of the frame. Powered with a 79cc OHV (Overhead Valve) 4-Stroke engine with centrifugal clutch. Equipped with a well-built frame and 10 gauge spoke wheels and a Front and Rear hydraulic disk brakes to handle rough terrains. Off roads? No problem! Now go out and have an epic ride What's new ? Upgraded 26" Suspension Fork Thicker tubes (from 2.4mm upgraded to 3mm) Front and rear hub with sealed bearing Upgraded aluminum kickstand Use of 6 sets of bolt and lock nut to screw the disc break hub Upgraded rear sprocket and jackshaft fixing bolt to 10.9 class high tensile steel Loctite on all screws Full aluminum throttle handle bar 10G spokes Hydraulic disc brake Stronger cardboard with plastic handles and 3 packaging foams 44T rear sprocket 7 speeds 180mm front disc *Patent Pending Built-in Jack-shaft ALL NEW Shimano 7-Speed Gears Phatmoto Performance Heavy Duty #35 Clutch 11 Tooth Integrated Gas Tank Frame Built-in Frame Upgraded Jackshaft 180mm Front Disk Brake Rear Disk Brake Suspension Front Fork 79cc - 3.0 Horsepower 4 stroke Lifan engine 100 miles per full tank Available in 3 colors Comes with removable Front and Rear Racks 32 MPH Max. Speed option has a 44 tooth rear sprocket. 25 MPH Max. Speed option has a 50 tooth rear sprocket. * To upgrade to the 32 MPH Max Speed, it is necessary to replace the stock 50-tooth rear sprocket that originally comes with the bike to 44 tooth sprocket. At PHATMOTO, we take care of this replacement for you, which involves a considerable amount of labor including sizing the 415 chain. * Please note, this motorized bicycle requires assembly. Phatmoto is the affordable all-in-one motorized bike that eliminates the complexities with engine conversion kits. Our custom designed gas bike can be pedal or engine-powered and travels up to 100 miles at speeds of 25 MPH/32 MPH on less than 1 gallon of gas. Far from your standard motorized gas-hybrid bike, Phatmoto hides quite a bit of convenient engineering features within traditional bike frame appearance... With Phatmoto's fully-equipped motorized bicycle, attach the handlebars and front wheel, and with some minimal engine assembly, put in some gas and you're off. Pedal, Gas Motor, or Hybrid Power Unlike many DIY conversion kits or electric bikes, Phatmoto was specifically engineered as a dual purpose gas-hybrid bike that makes it significantly easier to ride when pedaling alone and doesn't restrict the engine when under gas power. Custom Engineered Bike Frame Unlike many DIY gas bike conversion kits, Phatmoto's bicycle frame is engineered from the ground up to discreetly hide its fuel tank internally, securely bolts its motor to built-in frame mount, and safely encases the drivetrain to avoid accidents. Easy Pull-Start Handle Engine Unlike most DIY gas bike conversion kits using two-stroke engines that require vigorous pedaling turn on, Phatmoto opted for a four-stroke engine with a simple pull-start handle and on/off switch for quick and effortless riding. description.plain: PHATMOTO™ ALL TERRAIN Fat Tire - 79cc 4 Stroke is the only Motorized Bicycle that integrates both a built-in gas tank and jackshaft drive train as part of the frame. Powered with a 79cc OHV (Overhead Valve) 4-Stroke engine with centrifugal clutch. Equipped with a well-built frame and 10 gauge spoke wheels and a Front and Rear hydraulic disk brakes to handle rough terrains. Off roads? No problem! Now go out and have an epic ride What's new ? Upgraded 26" Suspension Fork Thicker tubes (from 2.4mm upgraded to 3mm) Front and rear hub with sealed bearing Upgraded aluminum kickstand Use of 6 sets of bolt and lock nut to screw the disc break hub Upgraded rear sprocket and jackshaft fixing bolt to 10.9 class high tensile steel Loctite on all screws Full aluminum throttle handle bar 10G spokes Hydraulic disc brake Stronger cardboard with plastic handles and 3 packaging foams 44T rear sprocket 7 speeds 180mm front disc *Patent Pending Built-in Jack-shaft ALL NEW Shimano 7-Speed Gears Phatmoto Performance Heavy Duty #35 Clutch 11 Tooth Integrated Gas Tank Frame Built-in Frame Upgraded Jackshaft 180mm Front Disk Brake Rear Disk Brake Suspension Front Fork 79cc - 3.0 Horsepower 4 stroke Lifan engine 100 miles per full tank Available in 3 colors Comes with removable Front and Rear Racks 32 MPH Max. Speed option has a 44 tooth rear sprocket. 25 MPH Max. Speed option has a 50 tooth rear sprocket. * To upgrade to the 32 MPH Max Speed, it is necessary to replace the stock 50-tooth rear sprocket that originally comes with the bike to 44 tooth sprocket. At PHATMOTO, we take care of this replacement for you, which involves a considerable amount of labor including sizing the 415 chain. * Please note, this motorized bicycle requires assembly. Phatmoto is the affordable all-in-one motorized bike that eliminates the complexities with engine conversion kits. Our custom designed gas bike can be pedal or engine-powered and travels up to 100 miles at speeds of 25 MPH/32 MPH on less than 1 gallon of gas. Far from your standard motorized gas-hybrid bike, Phatmoto hides quite a bit of convenient engineering features within traditional bike frame appearance... With Phatmoto's fully-equipped motorized bicycle, attach the handlebars and front wheel, and with some minimal engine assembly, put in some gas and you're off. Pedal, Gas Motor, or Hybrid Power Unlike many DIY conversion kits or electric bikes, Phatmoto was specifically engineered as a dual purpose gas-hybrid bike that makes it significantly easier to ride when pedaling alone and doesn't restrict the engine when under gas power. Custom Engineered Bike Frame Unlike many DIY gas bike conversion kits, Phatmoto's bicycle frame is engineered from the ground up to discreetly hide its fuel tank internally, securely bolts its motor to built-in frame mount, and safely encases the drivetrain to avoid accidents. Easy Pull-Start Handle Engine Unlike most DIY gas bike conversion kits using two-stroke engines that require vigorous pedaling turn on, Phatmoto opted for a four-stroke engine with a simple pull-start handle and on/off switch for quick and effortless riding.
